summary: Wait times for in-person parking summons hearings climbed steadily from fiscal 2022 through 2025. DOF's own reporting attributes this to a rising number of hearings combined with a shortage of administrative law judges, since the agency has struggled to recruit and retain judges in a competitive legal job market. DOF says it is actively working on strategies to hire and keep more judges.

sources.label: NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
